APP_ENV=local
APP_KEY=
APP_DEBUG=true
APP_URL=http://localhost

LOG_CHANNEL=stack
LOG_LEVEL=debug

DB_CONNECTION=mysql
DB_HOST=127.0.0.1
DB_PORT=3306
DB_DATABASE=laravel

DB_PASSWORD=

info.name: Exposed JSON Configuration Files
author: geeknik

These files often contain production configurations and credentials that should not be publicly accessible.
